Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(* In LiftedTensor.v and LiftedTensor.v, we have shown that given a category C equipped with a binary operation T and an object I (called the tensor and unit resp.),
then, this structures 'transport' to a weakly equivalent univalent category D, by a weak equivalence H:C->D, making this univalent category D with a tensor and unit,
the free univalent category equipped with a tensor and a unit.
In this file, we show that if we equip (C,T,I) with a left and/or right unitor, then
1: the unitor(s) also transports to D.
2: H preserves the unitor(s) as a monoidal functor preserves the unitor(s).
3: H makes D the free univalent category equipped with tensor, unit and the unitors.
More details about the universality and the Rezk-completion can be found in LiftedMonoidal.v
*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecompEquivalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.catiso.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalCategoriesTensored.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalFunctorCategory.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.TotalCategoryFacts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.RezkCompletion.LiftedTensor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.RezkCompletion.LiftedTensorUnit.

Local Open Scope mor_disp.
Local Open Scope cat.

Section RezkLeftUnitor.

  Context {C D : category} {H : functor C D}
          (Duniv : is_univalent D)
          (H_eso : essentially_surjective H)
          (H_ff : fully_faithful H).

  Context (TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C) (I : C)
          (lu : left_unitor TC I).

  Let TD := TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC.

  Local Notation HH := (pair_functor H H).
  Let HH_eso := pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso.
  Let HH_ff := pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
nat_z_iso (H ∙ I_pretensor TD (H I))
  (I_pretensor TC I ∙ H)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
nat_z_iso (H ∙ I_pretensor TD (H I))
  (I_pretensor TC I ∙ H)

H: C ⟶ D

H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
C ⟶ D

HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
nat_z_iso (H ∙ I_pretensor TD (H I)) ?G

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
nat_z_iso (I_pretensor TD (H I)) ?G2

      apply tensor_after_pair_with_object_left.
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
nat_z_iso (H ∙ (pair_with_object_left (H I) ∙ TD))
  (I_pretensor TC I ∙ H)

      2: apply tensor_after_pair_with_object_left.

  ((pair_with_object_left I ∙ TC) ∙ H)

      exact (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC).

  (pair_with_object_left I
   ∙ (HH ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))

 apply (nat_z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc _ _ _)).

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
nat_z_iso ((H ∙ pair_with_object_left (H I)) ∙ TD)
  ((pair_with_object_left I ∙ HH)
   ∙ TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)


    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
nat_z_iso (H ∙ pair_with_object_left (H I))
  (pair_with_object_left I ∙ HH)

    apply PairingWithObjectCommutesLeft.
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
left_unitor TD (H I)

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
nat_z_iso (I_pretensor TC I ∙ H)
  (H ∙ functor_identity D)

    exact (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H).
  Defined.

  Let luD := TransportedLeftUnitor.

  (* The following definition relates the transported left unitor
     with the left unitor on C. In particular, this shows that
     H preserves the left unitor *)
  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
pre_whisker H TransportedLeftUnitor =
nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
pre_whisker H TransportedLeftUnitor =
nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
t:= lift_nat_trans_along_comm 
  (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
     (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
        (nat_z_iso_inv (functor_commutes_with_id H)))): pre_whisker H
  (lift_nat_trans_along 
     (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff
     (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
        (nat_z_iso_comp
           (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
           (nat_z_iso_inv
              (functor_commutes_with_id H))))) =
nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
  (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
     (nat_z_iso_inv (functor_commutes_with_id H)))
pre_whisker H TransportedLeftUnitor =
nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)

  (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
     (nat_z_iso_inv (functor_commutes_with_id H)))
∏ x : C,
pr1 (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H) x =
pr1
  (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
     (nat_z_iso_inv (functor_commutes_with_id H))) x

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
t:= lift_nat_trans_along_comm 
  (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
     (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
        (nat_z_iso_inv (functor_commutes_with_id H)))): pre_whisker H
  (lift_nat_trans_along 
     (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff
     (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
        (nat_z_iso_comp
           (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
           (nat_z_iso_inv
              (functor_commutes_with_id H))))) =
nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
  (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
     (nat_z_iso_inv (functor_commutes_with_id H)))
has_homsets (D,, Duniv)
 apply homset_property.

H: C ⟶ D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

t:= lift_nat_trans_along_comm 
  (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff

     (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
        (nat_z_iso_inv (functor_commutes_with_id H)))): pre_whisker H

     (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff
     (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor

  (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
     (nat_z_iso_inv (functor_commutes_with_id H)))
transportf
  (λ x : I_pretensor TC I ∙ H ⟹ H ∙ functor_identity D,
   is_nat_z_iso x) ?p
  (pr2
     (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
        (nat_z_iso_inv (functor_commutes_with_id H)))) =
pr2 (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)

H_ff: fully_faithful H

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
t:= lift_nat_trans_along_comm 
  (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff
  (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
     (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
        (nat_z_iso_inv (functor_commutes_with_id H)))): pre_whisker H

     (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff
     (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor

  (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
     (nat_z_iso_inv (functor_commutes_with_id H)))

  (nat_z_iso_comp (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)
     (nat_z_iso_inv (functor_commutes_with_id H))) x =

  Qed.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
functor_lu_disp_cat lu luD
  (H,,
   pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC),,
   id H I)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
functor_lu_disp_cat lu luD
  (H,,
   pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC),,
   id H I)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
luD (pr1 H c) =
# TD (id H I #, id pr1 H c)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (I, c) · # (pr1 H) (lu c)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
t:= toforallpaths
  (λ x : C,
   D
   ⟦ functor_composite_data H
       (I_pretensor TD (H I)) x,
   functor_composite_data H (functor_identity D) x
   ⟧) (pr1 (pre_whisker H TransportedLeftUnitor))
  (pr1
     (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)))
  (base_paths (pre_whisker H TransportedLeftUnitor)
     (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H))
     TransportedLeftUnitorEq) c: pr1 (pre_whisker H TransportedLeftUnitor) c =
pr1
  (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)) c
luD (pr1 H c) =
# TD (id H I #, id pr1 H c)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (I, c) · # (pr1 H) (lu c)

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
t:= toforallpaths
  (λ x : C,
   D
   ⟦ functor_composite_data H
       (I_pretensor TD (H I)) x,
   functor_composite_data H (functor_identity D) x
   ⟧) (pr1 (pre_whisker H TransportedLeftUnitor))
  (pr1

        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)))
  (base_paths (pre_whisker H TransportedLeftUnitor)
     (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor

     TransportedLeftUnitorEq) c: pr1 (pre_whisker H TransportedLeftUnitor) c =
pr1
  (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)) c
pr1
  (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPretensor
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)) c =
# TD (id H I #, id pr1 H c)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (I, c) · # (pr1 H) (lu c)

?y = # TD (id H I #, id pr1 H c)

      exact (! functor_id TD (H I , H c)).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D

     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso lu H)) c =

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
id functor_fix_fst_arg_ob D D D TD (H I) (pr1 H c)
· (id TD (H I, H c)
   · (# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
        (id (H I, H c))
      · id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (H I, H c))
   · pr1
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)) (I, c) · id H (TC (I, c))
   · # H (id TC (I, c))) · # (pr1 H) (pr1 lu c) =
pr1
  (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (I, c) · # (pr1 H) (lu c)

H: C ⟶ D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

c: C
# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (id (H I, H c))
· id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (H I, H c)
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)

          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (I, c) · id H (TC (I, c))
· # H (id TC (I, c)) · # (pr1 H) (pr1 lu c) =
pr1
  (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (I, c) · # (pr1 H) (lu c)

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

c: C
pr1
  (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (I, c) · # (pr1 H) (pr1 lu c) =
pr1
  (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (I, c) · # (pr1 H) (lu c)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
TransportedLeftUnitor (H c) =
LiftPreservesPretensor c · # H (lu c)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
TransportedLeftUnitor (H c) =
LiftPreservesPretensor c · # H (lu c)

    exact (toforallpaths _ _ _ (base_paths _ _ TransportedLeftUnitorEq) c).
  Qed.

  Context {E : category} (Euniv : is_univalent E)
          (TE : functor (E ⊠ E) E) (IE : E)
          (luE : left_unitor TE IE).

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
disp_functor
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I TE
     IE) (functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE)
  (functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE)

disp_functor

     IE) (functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE)
  (functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE)

Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E

(λ FF : disp_functor_data
          (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
             TC I TE IE) 
          (functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE)
          (functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE),
 disp_functor_axioms FF) 
  ?pr1

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
∏
x : functor_tensorunit_cat
      (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE (H I)
      IE,
functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
→ functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
    (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
       TE IE x)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
(λ Fob : ∏
         x : functor_tensorunit_cat
               (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
               TE (H I) IE,
         functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
         → functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
             (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
                H_ff TC I TE IE x),
 ∏
 (x
  y : functor_tensorunit_cat
        (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
        (H I) IE) (xx : functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x)
 (yy : functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y)
 (f : functor_tensorunit_cat
        (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
        (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   # (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
        TE IE) f] Fob y yy) 
  ?pr1

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
∏
x : functor_tensorunit_cat
      (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE (H I)
      IE,
functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
→ functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
    (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
       TE IE x)

      exact (λ G GG, functor_lu_composition H_plu GG).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
(λ FF : disp_functor_data
          (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
             TC I TE IE) (functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE)
          (functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE),
 disp_functor_axioms FF)
  ((λ (G : functor_tensorunit_cat
             (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
             TE (H I) IE)
    (GG : functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE G),
    functor_lu_composition H_plu GG),,
   ((λ (x
        y : functor_tensorunit_cat
              (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
              TE (H I) IE)
     (xx : functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x)
     (yy : functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y)
     (f : functor_tensorunit_cat
            (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
            (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧) (_ : xx -->[ f] yy), tt)
    :
    (λ Fob : ∏
             x : functor_tensorunit_cat
                   (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC) TE (H I) IE,
             functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
             → functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
                 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE x),
     ∏
     (x
      y : functor_tensorunit_cat
            (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
            (H I) IE)
     (xx : functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x)
     (yy : functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y)
     (f : functor_tensorunit_cat
            (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
            (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     xx -->[ f] yy
     → Fob x xx -->[
       # (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
            TC I TE IE) f] Fob y yy)
      (λ (G : functor_tensorunit_cat
                (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
                TE (H I) IE)
       (GG : functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE G),
       functor_lu_composition H_plu GG)))
 split ; intro ; intros ; apply isapropunit.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
disp_functor_ff precompLU

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E

disp_functor_ff precompLU

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
yy: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
isweq (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff)

Duniv: is_univalent D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
yy: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
isincl (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff)

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE

xx: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
yy: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompLU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompLU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) y0
isofhlevel 0 (x0 = x')

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
yy: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompLU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompLU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) y0
isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompLU ff) y0)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
yy: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompLU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompLU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompLU ff) y0)
isofhlevel 0 (x0 = x')

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
yy: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompLU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompLU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) y0
isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompLU ff) y0)

        use isaset_hfiber ; use isasetaprop ; apply isapropunit.

H: C ⟶ D

lu: left_unitor TC I

transportf
  (λ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy,
   (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) x0 = y0) 
  ?p (pr2 x0) = pr2 x'

pr1 x0 = pr1 x'
 apply isapropunit. 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
yy: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompLU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompLU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompLU ff) y0)
transportf
  (λ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy,
   (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) x0 = y0)
  (let X := λ x x' : unit, pr1 (isapropunit x x') in
   X (pr1 x0) (pr1 x')) (pr2 x0) = pr2 x'

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
yy: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧

# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompLU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompLU ff) y0)
isaprop
  ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) (pr1 x') =
   y0)

        
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
yy: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompLU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompLU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompLU ff) y0)
isofhlevel 0
  ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) (pr1 x') =
   y0)

        apply isapropunit.
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
yy: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompLU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompLU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompLU ff) y0)
(λ cntr : x0 = x', ∏ t : x0 = x', t = cntr)
  (total2_paths_f
     (let X := λ x x' : unit, pr1 (isapropunit x x')
        in
      X (pr1 x0) (pr1 x'))
     (proofirrelevance
        ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff)
           (pr1 x') = y0)
        (hlevelntosn 0
           ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff)
              (pr1 x') = y0)
           (isapropunit (♯ precompLU (pr1 x')) y0))
        (transportf
           (λ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy,
            (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) x0 =
            y0)
           (let X :=
              λ x x' : unit, pr1 (isapropunit x x') in
            X (pr1 x0) (pr1 x')) (pr2 x0)) (pr2 x')))
 intro ; apply p.
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)

Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE x
yy: functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
issurjective (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff)

∥ hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompLU ff) y0 ∥

♯ precompLU tt = y0

      apply isapropunit.
  Qed.

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C

E: category

TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
disp_functor_disp_ess_split_surj precompLU

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
∑ yy : functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE G,
Isos.z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso
     (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
        TE IE G)) (precompLU G yy) GG

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I

  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
luE ((pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd))) =
# TE (pr22 G #, id (pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd)))
· (pr112 G) (H I, H (pr1 cd))
· # (pr11 G) (luD (H (pr1 cd)))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
# TE
  (pr22 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
           TC I TE IE G)
  #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
                 H_ff TC I TE IE G)) (pr1 cd))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
            TC I TE IE G)) (I, pr1 cd)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
             TC I TE IE G)) (lu (pr1 cd)) =
# TE (pr22 G #, id (pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd)))
· (pr112 G) (H I, H (pr1 cd))
· # (pr11 G) (luD (H (pr1 cd)))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
# TE
  (pr22 G · # (pr11 G) (id ID I)
  #, id pr1 G (H (pr1 cd)))
· ((pr12 G) (H I, H (pr1 cd))
   · # (pr1 G)
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (I, pr1 cd)))
· # (pr1 G) (# H (lu (pr1 cd))) =
# TE (pr22 G #, id (pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd)))
· (pr112 G) (H I, H (pr1 cd))
· # (pr11 G) (luD (H (pr1 cd)))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
# TE
  (pr22 G · id pr1 G (ID I) #, id pr1 G (H (pr1 cd)))
· ((pr12 G) (H I, H (pr1 cd))
   · # (pr1 G)
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (I, pr1 cd)))
· # (pr1 G) (# H (lu (pr1 cd))) =
# TE (pr22 G #, id (pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd)))
· (pr112 G) (H I, H (pr1 cd))
· # (pr11 G) (luD (H (pr1 cd)))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (I, pr1 cd) =
nat_z_iso_comp
  (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso H
     (tensor_after_pair_with_object_left TD (H I)))
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp
        (nat_z_iso_comp
           (nat_z_iso_comp
              (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc H
                 (pair_with_object_left (H I)) TD)
              (nat_z_iso_comp
                 (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
                    (PairingWithObjectCommutesLeft H I)
                    (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC))
                 (nat_z_iso_inv
                    (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
                       (pair_with_object_left I) HH
                       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                          H_ff TC)))))
           (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso
              (pair_with_object_left I)
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC)))
        (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
           (pair_with_object_left I) TC H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
           (tensor_after_pair_with_object_left TC I) H)))
  (pr1 cd)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (I, pr1 cd) =
id functor_fix_fst_arg_ob D D D TD (H I)
     (pr1 H (pr1 cd))
· (id TD (H I, H (pr1 cd))
   · (# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
        (id (H I, H (pr1 cd)))
      · id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (H I, H (pr1 cd)))
   · pr1
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)) (I, pr1 cd)
   · id H (TC (I, pr1 cd)) · # H (id TC (I, pr1 cd)))

  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective

        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)

· id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC

· pr1

       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (I, pr1 cd) · id H (TC (I, pr1 cd))
· # H (id TC (I, pr1 cd))

cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
?y =
# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (id (H I, H (pr1 cd)))

        apply (! functor_id _ _).
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (I, pr1 cd) =
id TD (H I, H (pr1 cd))
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (I, pr1 cd)

      apply (! id_left _).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
(λ yy : functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE G,
 Isos.z_iso_disp
   (identity_z_iso
      (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         I TE IE G)) (precompLU G yy) GG)
  ((λ d : D,
    factor_through_squash
      (E (I_pretensor TE IE ((pr11 G) d)) ((pr11 G) d)
         (luE ((pr11 G) d))
         (# TE (pr22 G #, id (pr11 G) d)
          · (pr112 G) (H I, d) · # (pr11 G) (luD d)))
      (λ cd : ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d,
       let p := isotoid D Duniv (pr2 cd) in
       paths_rect D (H (pr1 cd))
         (λ (d0 : D) (_ : H (pr1 cd) = d0),
          luE ((pr11 G) d0) =
          # TE (pr22 G #, id (pr11 G) d0)
          · (pr112 G) (H I, d0) · # (pr11 G) (luD d0))
         (GG (pr1 cd) @
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (E ⟦ pr1 G (ID I), pr1 G (ID I) ⟧)
             (# (pr1 G) (id ID I)) (id pr1 G (ID I))
             (λ p0 : E ⟦ pr1 G (ID I), pr1 G (ID I) ⟧,
              # TE
                (pr22 G · p0 #, id pr1 G (H (pr1 cd)))
              · ((pr12 G) (H I, H (pr1 cd))
                 · # (pr1 G)
                     (rad_eps
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (pre_composition_functor ...
                           ... D HH)
                        (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                           ... ... ... ... ... ...)
                        (TC ∙ H) (I, pr1 cd)))
              · # (pr1 G) (# H (lu (pr1 cd))) =
              # TE
                (pr22 G #, id (pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd)))
              · (pr112 G) (H I, H (pr1 cd))
              · # (pr11 G) (luD (H (pr1 cd))))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (E ⟦ IE, pr1 G (ID I) ⟧)
                (pr22 G · id pr1 G (ID I)) (pr22 G)
                (λ p0 : E ⟦ IE, pr1 G (ID I) ⟧,
                 # TE (p0 #, id pr1 G (H ...))
                 · ((pr12 G) (H I, H ...)
                    · # (pr1 G)
                        (rad_eps ... ... ... ... ...
                           ...))
                 · # (pr1 G) (# H (lu (...))) =
                 # TE (pr22 G #, id (pr11 G) (H ...))
                 · (pr112 G) (H I, H (pr1 cd))
                 · # (pr11 G) (luD (H (...))))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (E ⟦ TE (IE, pr1 G (H (...))),
                    pr1 G (H (pr1 cd)) ⟧)
                   (# TE (pr22 G #, id pr1 G (H ...))
                    · ((pr12 G) (H I, H ...)
                       · # (pr1 G)
                           (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                              ... ...))
                    · # (pr1 G) (# H (lu (...))))
                   (# TE
                      (pr22 G #, id pr1 G (H (...)))
                    · ((pr12 G) (H I, H ...)
                       · # (pr1 G)
                           (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                              ... ...)
                       · # (pr1 G) (# H (...))))
                   (λ p0 : E ⟦ TE (IE, pr1 G (...)),
                           pr1 G (H (...)) ⟧,
                    p0 =
                    # TE (pr22 G #, id ... ...)
                    · (pr112 G) (H I, H ...)
                    · # (pr11 G) (luD (...)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (E
                       ⟦ TE (pr1 G (...), pr1 G (...)),
                       pr1 G (H (...)) ⟧)
                      ((pr12 G) (H I, H ...)
                       · # (pr1 G)
                           (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                              ... ...)
                       · # (pr1 G) (# H (...)))
                      ((pr12 G) (H I, H (...))
                       · (# (...) (...)
                          · # (...) (...)))
                      (λ p0 : E ⟦ TE (..., ...),
                              pr1 G (...) ⟧,
                       # TE (pr22 G #, id ...) · p0 =
                       # TE ... · ... ...
                       · # (pr11 G) (...))
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (E ⟦ TE (IE, ...),
                          (pr11 G) (...) ⟧)
                         (# TE ... · ... ...
                          · # (pr11 G) (...))
                         (# TE (pr22 G #, id ...)
                          · (... · ...))
                         (λ p0 : E ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                          ... · ... = p0)
                         (maponpaths (compose ...)
                            (maponpaths ... ...))
                         (assoc' (# TE ...) (... ...)
                            (# ... ...)))
                      (assoc' ((pr12 G) (H I, H ...))
                         (# (pr1 G)
                            (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                               ... ...))
                         (# (pr1 G) (# H ...))))
                   (assoc'
                      (# TE
                         (pr22 G #, id pr1 G (H ...)))
                      ((pr12 G) (H I, H (...))
                       · # (pr1 G)
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...)
                              (I, ...)))
                      (# (pr1 G) (# H (lu ...)))))
                (id_right (pr22 G)))
             (functor_id (pr1 G) (ID I))
           :
           # TE
             (pr22 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                      H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G)
             #, id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor
                            Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I TE
                            IE G)) (pr1 cd))
           · (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                       H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
               (I, pr1 cd)
           · # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                        H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
               (lu (pr1 cd)) =
           # TE (pr22 G #, id (pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd)))
           · (pr112 G) (H I, H (pr1 cd))
           · # (pr11 G) (luD (H (pr1 cd))))) d p)
      (H_eso d))
   :
   functor_lu_disp_cat luD luE G)
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
Isos.is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso
     (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
        TE IE G)) tt

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
Isos.is_disp_inverse
  (identity_z_iso
     (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
        TE IE G)) tt tt

      split ; apply isapropunit.
  Qed.

TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E

fully_faithful (total_functor precompLU)

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

is_univalent (functor_tensorunit_cat TC TE I IE)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
Univalence.is_univalent_disp
  (functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
is_univalent (functor_tensorunit_cat TC TE I IE)
 apply (is_univalent_total_category (is_univalent_functor_category _ _ Euniv) (functor_tensorunit_disp_cat_is_univalent _ _ _ _)).
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
lu: left_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
luD:= TransportedLeftUnitor: left_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
luE: left_unitor TE IE
Univalence.is_univalent_disp
  (functor_lu_disp_cat lu luE)
 apply functor_lu_disp_cat_is_univalent.
  Defined.

End RezkLeftUnitor.

Section RezkRightUnitor.

  Context {C D : category} {H : functor C D}
          (Duniv : is_univalent D)
          (H_eso : essentially_surjective H)
          (H_ff : fully_faithful H).

  Context (TC : functor (C ⊠ C) C) (I : C)
          (ru : right_unitor TC I).

  Let TD := TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC.

  Local Notation HH := (pair_functor H H).
  Let HH_eso := pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso.
  Let HH_ff := pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
nat_z_iso (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
  (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
nat_z_iso (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
  (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H)

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

      apply tensor_after_pair_with_object_right.

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
nat_z_iso (H ∙ pair_with_object_right (H I))
  (pair_with_object_right I ∙ HH)

    apply PairingWithObjectCommutesRight.
  Defined.

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I

HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
right_unitor TD (H I)

C ⟶ (D,, Duniv)

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
nat_z_iso (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H)
  (H ∙ functor_identity D)

    exact (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H).
  Defined.

  Let ruD := TransportedRightUnitor.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
pre_whisker H TransportedRightUnitor =
nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
  (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H) (functor_identity C ∙ H)
  LiftPreservesPostTensor
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
pre_whisker H TransportedRightUnitor =
nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
  (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H) (functor_identity C ∙ H)
  LiftPreservesPostTensor
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
pre_whisker H
  (lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff
     (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPostTensor
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H))) =
nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
  (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H) (functor_identity C ∙ H)
  LiftPreservesPostTensor
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H)

pre_whisker H
  (lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff
     (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPostTensor
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H))) = ?b
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
?b =
nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
  (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H) 
  (functor_identity C ∙ H) LiftPreservesPostTensor
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H)

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

  LiftPreservesPostTensor
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H)
 apply (lift_nat_trans_along_comm (_,,Duniv) _ H_eso H_ff). 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
pre_whisker H
  (lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff
     (nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPostTensor
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H))) =
pre_whisker H
  (lift_nat_trans_along (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff
     (nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
        (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H)
        (functor_identity C ∙ H)
        LiftPreservesPostTensor
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H)))

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

lift_nat_z_iso_along (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff

     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H)) =
lift_nat_trans_along (D,, Duniv) H H_eso H_ff
  (nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
     (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H) (functor_identity C ∙ H)
     LiftPreservesPostTensor
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H))

  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H) =

H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
has_homsets (D,, Duniv)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
∏ x : C,
nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPostTensor
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H) x =
nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
  (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H) 
  (functor_identity C ∙ H) LiftPreservesPostTensor
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H) x

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
has_homsets (D,, Duniv)
 apply homset_property. 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
∏ x : C,
nat_z_iso_comp LiftPreservesPostTensor
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H) x =
nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
  (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H) (functor_identity C ∙ H)
  LiftPreservesPostTensor
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H) x

    intro ; apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruD
  (H,,
   pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC),,
   id H I)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruD
  (H,,
   pr1 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC),,
   id H I)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
ruD (pr1 H c) =
# TD (id pr1 H c #, id H I)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (c, I) · # (pr1 H) (ru c)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
t:= toforallpaths
  (λ x : C,
   D
   ⟦ functor_composite_data H
       (I_posttensor TD (H I)) x,
   functor_composite_data H (functor_identity D) x
   ⟧) (pr1 (pre_whisker H TransportedRightUnitor))
  (pr1
     (nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
        (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H)
        (functor_identity C ∙ H)
        LiftPreservesPostTensor
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H)))
  (base_paths
     (pre_whisker H TransportedRightUnitor)
     (nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
        (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H)
        (functor_identity C ∙ H)
        LiftPreservesPostTensor
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H))
     TransportedRightUnitorEq) c: pr1 (pre_whisker H TransportedRightUnitor) c =
pr1
  (nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
     (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H)
     (functor_identity C ∙ H)
     LiftPreservesPostTensor
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H)) c
ruD (pr1 H c) =
# TD (id pr1 H c #, id H I)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (c, I) · # (pr1 H) (ru c)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
t:= toforallpaths
  (λ x : C,
   D
   ⟦ functor_composite_data H
       (I_posttensor TD (H I)) x,
   functor_composite_data H (functor_identity D) x
   ⟧) (pr1 (pre_whisker H TransportedRightUnitor))
  (pr1
     (nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
        (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H)
        (functor_identity C ∙ H)
        LiftPreservesPostTensor
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H)))
  (base_paths
     (pre_whisker H TransportedRightUnitor)
     (nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
        (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H)
        (functor_identity C ∙ H)
        LiftPreservesPostTensor
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H))
     TransportedRightUnitorEq) c: pr1 (pre_whisker H TransportedRightUnitor) c =
pr1
  (nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
     (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H)
     (functor_identity C ∙ H)
     LiftPreservesPostTensor
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H)) c
pr1
  (nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
     (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H) (functor_identity C ∙ H)
     LiftPreservesPostTensor
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H)) c =
# TD (id pr1 H c #, id H I)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (c, I) · # (pr1 H) (ru c)

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
?b =
# TD (id pr1 H c #, id H I)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (c, I) · # (pr1 H) (ru c)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
?y = # TD (id pr1 H c #, id H I)

      exact (! functor_id TD (H c , H I)).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
pr1
  (nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))
     (I_posttensor TC I ∙ H) (functor_identity C ∙ H)
     LiftPreservesPostTensor
     (post_whisker_nat_z_iso ru H)) c =
id TD (H c, H I)
· (pr11 (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
    (c, I) · # (pr1 H) (ru c)

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

pr1
  (nat_trans_comp (H ∙ I_posttensor TD (H I))

     LiftPreservesPostTensor
