C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
id functor_fix_snd_arg_ob D D D TD (H I) (pr1 H c)
· (id TD (H c, H I)
   · (# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
        (id (H c, H I))
      · id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (H c, H I))
   · pr1
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)) (c, I) · id H (TC (c, I))
   · # H (id TC (c, I))) · # (pr1 H) (pr1 ru c) =
pr1
  (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (c, I) · # (pr1 H) (ru c)

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

  (id (H c, H I))
· id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC (H c, H I)
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (c, I) · id H (TC (c, I))
· # H (id TC (c, I)) · # (pr1 H) (pr1 ru c) =
pr1
  (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)

        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (c, I) · # (pr1 H) (ru c)

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

id lift_functor_along (D,, Duniv) HH HH_eso HH_ff
     (TC ∙ H) (H c, H I)
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
pr1
  (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (c, I) · # (pr1 H) (pr1 ru c) =
pr1
  (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H))
  (c, I) · # (pr1 H) (ru c)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
TransportedRightUnitor (H c) =
LiftPreservesPostTensor c · # H (ru c)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
c: C
TransportedRightUnitor (H c) =
LiftPreservesPostTensor c · # H (ru c)

    exact (toforallpaths _ _ _ (base_paths _ _ TransportedRightUnitorEq) c).
  Qed.

  Context {E : category} (Euniv : is_univalent E)
          (TE : functor (E ⊠ E) E) (IE : E)
          (ruE : right_unitor TE IE).

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
disp_functor
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I TE
     IE) (functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE)
  (functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE)

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
disp_functor
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I TE
     IE) (functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE)
  (functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE)

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
disp_functor_data
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I TE
     IE) (functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE)
  (functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
(λ FF : disp_functor_data
          (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
             TC I TE IE) 
          (functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE)
          (functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE),
 disp_functor_axioms FF) 
  ?pr1

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
disp_functor_data
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I TE
     IE) (functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE)
  (functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE)
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
∏
x : functor_tensorunit_cat
      (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE (H I)
      IE,
functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
→ functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
    (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
       TE IE x)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
(λ Fob : ∏
         x : functor_tensorunit_cat
               (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
               TE (H I) IE,
         functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
         → functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
             (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
                H_ff TC I TE IE x),
 ∏
 (x
  y : functor_tensorunit_cat
        (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
        (H I) IE) (xx : functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x)
 (yy : functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y)
 (f : functor_tensorunit_cat
        (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
        (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   # (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
        TE IE) f] Fob y yy) 
  ?pr1

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
∏
x : functor_tensorunit_cat
      (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE (H I)
      IE,
functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
→ functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
    (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
       TE IE x)

      exact (λ G GG, functor_ru_composition H_pru GG).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
(λ FF : disp_functor_data
          (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
             TC I TE IE) (functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE)
          (functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE),
 disp_functor_axioms FF)
  ((λ (G : functor_tensorunit_cat
             (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
             TE (H I) IE)
    (GG : functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE G),
    functor_ru_composition H_pru GG),,
   ((λ (x
        y : functor_tensorunit_cat
              (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
              TE (H I) IE)
     (xx : functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x)
     (yy : functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y)
     (f : functor_tensorunit_cat
            (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
            (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧) (_ : xx -->[ f] yy), tt)
    :
    (λ Fob : ∏
             x : functor_tensorunit_cat
                   (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff
                      TC) TE (H I) IE,
             functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
             → functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
                 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                    H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE x),
     ∏
     (x
      y : functor_tensorunit_cat
            (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
            (H I) IE)
     (xx : functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x)
     (yy : functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y)
     (f : functor_tensorunit_cat
            (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE
            (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     xx -->[ f] yy
     → Fob x xx -->[
       # (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
            TC I TE IE) f] Fob y yy)
      (λ (G : functor_tensorunit_cat
                (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC)
                TE (H I) IE)
       (GG : functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE G),
       functor_ru_composition H_pru GG)))
 split ; intro ; intros ; apply isapropunit.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
disp_functor_ff precompRU

  
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
disp_functor_ff precompRU

    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
yy: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
isweq (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff)

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
yy: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
isincl (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff)

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE

issurjective (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff)

Duniv: is_univalent D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
yy: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
isincl (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff)
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
yy: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompRU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompRU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff) y0
isofhlevel 0 (x0 = x')

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
yy: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompRU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompRU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff) y0
isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompRU ff) y0)
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
yy: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompRU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompRU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompRU ff) y0)
isofhlevel 0 (x0 = x')

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
yy: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompRU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompRU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff) y0
isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompRU ff) y0)

        use isaset_hfiber ; use isasetaprop ; apply isapropunit.
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE

     I TE IE) f] precompRU y yy

isofhlevel 0 (x0 = x')

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
yy: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompRU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompRU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompRU ff) y0)
x0 = x'
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
yy: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompRU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompRU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompRU ff) y0)
(λ cntr : x0 = x', ∏ t : x0 = x', t = cntr) ?pr1

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
yy: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompRU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompRU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompRU ff) y0)
x0 = x'

transportf
  (λ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy,
   (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff) x0 = y0) 
  ?p (pr2 x0) = pr2 x'

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
yy: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompRU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompRU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompRU ff) y0)
isofhlevel 0
  ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff) (pr1 x') =
   y0)

        apply isapropunit.
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
x, y: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
xx: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE x
yy: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y
f: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
y0: precompRU x xx -->[
# (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE) f] precompRU y yy
x0, x': hfiber (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff) y0
p: isaset (hfiber (λ ff : unit, ♯ precompRU ff) y0)
(λ cntr : x0 = x', ∏ t : x0 = x', t = cntr)
  (total2_paths_f
     (let X := λ x x' : unit, pr1 (isapropunit x x')
        in
      X (pr1 x0) (pr1 x'))
     (proofirrelevance
        ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff)
           (pr1 x') = y0)
        (hlevelntosn 0
           ((λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff)
              (pr1 x') = y0)
           (isapropunit (♯ precompRU (pr1 x')) y0))
        (transportf
           (λ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy,
            (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff) x0 =
            y0)
           (let X :=
              λ x x' : unit, pr1 (isapropunit x x') in
            X (pr1 x0) (pr1 x')) (pr2 x0)) (pr2 x')))
 intro ; apply p.

yy: functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE y

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE ⟦ x, y ⟧
issurjective (λ ff : xx -->[ f] yy, ♯ precompRU ff)

∑ yy : functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE G,
Isos.z_iso_disp

     (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
        TE IE G)) (precompRU G yy) GG

C, D: category

Duniv: is_univalent D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
ruE ((pr11 G) d) =
# TE (id (pr11 G) d #, pr22 G) · (pr112 G) (d, H I)
· # (pr11 G) (ruD d)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
UU

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

isaprop
  (ruE ((pr11 G) d) =
   # TE (id (pr11 G) d #, pr22 G) · (pr112 G) (d, H I)
   · # (pr11 G) (ruD d))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
ruE ((pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd))) =
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd)) #, pr22 G)
· (pr112 G) (H (pr1 cd), H I)
· # (pr11 G) (ruD (H (pr1 cd)))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
# TE
  (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso
               H_ff TC I TE IE G)) (pr1 cd)
  #, pr22 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
             TC I TE IE G))
· (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
            TC I TE IE G)) (pr1 cd, I)
· # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff
             TC I TE IE G)) (ru (pr1 cd)) =
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd)) #, pr22 G)
· (pr112 G) (H (pr1 cd), H I)
· # (pr11 G) (ruD (H (pr1 cd)))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
# TE
  (id pr1 G (H (pr1 cd))
  #, pr22 G · # (pr11 G) (id ID I))
· ((pr12 G) (H (pr1 cd), H I)
   · # (pr1 G)
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (pr1 cd, I)))
· # (pr1 G) (# H (ru (pr1 cd))) =
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd)) #, pr22 G)
· (pr112 G) (H (pr1 cd), H I)
· # (pr11 G) (ruD (H (pr1 cd)))

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
# TE
  (id pr1 G (H (pr1 cd)) #, pr22 G · id pr1 G (ID I))
· ((pr12 G) (H (pr1 cd), H I)
   · # (pr1 G)
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H) (pr1 cd, I)))
· # (pr1 G) (# H (ru (pr1 cd))) =
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd)) #, pr22 G)
· (pr112 G) (H (pr1 cd), H I)
· # (pr11 G) (ruD (H (pr1 cd)))

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
# TE (id pr1 G (H (pr1 cd)) #, pr22 G)
· ((pr12 G) (H (pr1 cd), H I)
   · (# (pr1 G)
        (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
           [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
           (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
              HH)
           (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
              [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
              [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
              (is_univalent_functor_category
                 (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                 Duniv)
              (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                 D HH)
              (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
              (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                 (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                 (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                 (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
           (TC ∙ H) (pr1 cd, I))
      · # (pr1 G) (# H (ru (pr1 cd))))) =
# TE (id (pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd)) #, pr22 G)
· ((pr112 G) (H (pr1 cd), H I)
   · # (pr11 G) (ruD (H (pr1 cd))))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)

Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
# (pr1 G)
  (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
        [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
        [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
        (is_univalent_functor_category
           (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
        (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
        (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
           (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
           (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
           (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
     (pr1 cd, I)) · # (pr1 G) (# H (ru (pr1 cd))) =
# (pr11 G) (ruD (H (pr1 cd)))

        (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective

  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split

        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)

        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective

        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (pr1 cd, I) · # H (ru (pr1 cd)) = ruD (H (pr1 cd))

H: C ⟶ D

     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]

C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (pr1 cd, I) =
nat_z_iso_comp
  (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso H
     (tensor_after_pair_with_object_right TD (H I)))
  (nat_z_iso_comp
     (nat_z_iso_comp
        (nat_z_iso_comp
           (nat_z_iso_comp
              (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc H
                 (pair_with_object_right (H I)) TD)
              (nat_z_iso_comp
                 (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
                    (PairingWithObjectCommutesRight H
                       I)
                    (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                       H_ff TC))
                 (nat_z_iso_inv
                    (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
                       (pair_with_object_right I) HH
                       (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso
                          H_ff TC)))))
           (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso
              (pair_with_object_right I)
              (TransportedTensorComm Duniv H_eso H_ff
                 TC)))
        (nat_z_iso_functor_comp_assoc
           (pair_with_object_right I) TC H))
     (nat_z_iso_inv
        (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
           (tensor_after_pair_with_object_right TC I)
           H))) (pr1 cd)

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (pr1 cd, I) =
id functor_fix_snd_arg_ob D D D TD (H I)
     (pr1 H (pr1 cd))
· (id TD (H (pr1 cd), H I)
   · (# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
        (id (H (pr1 cd), H I))
      · id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
             (H (pr1 cd), H I))
   · pr1
       (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
             [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
             [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
             (is_univalent_functor_category
                (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D
                Duniv)
             (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D)
                D HH)
             (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
             (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
                (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
                (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
                (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
          (TC ∙ H)) (pr1 cd, I)
   · id H (TC (pr1 cd, I)) · # H (id TC (pr1 cd, I)))

H: C ⟶ D

H_ff: fully_faithful H

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE

     I TE IE G)

cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (pr1 cd, I) =
# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (id (H (pr1 cd), H I))
· id TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
       (H (pr1 cd), H I)
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (pr1 cd, I) · id H (TC (pr1 cd, I))
· # H (id TC (pr1 cd, I))

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (pr1 cd, I) =
# (pr1 (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC))
  (id (H (pr1 cd), H I))
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (pr1 cd, I) · # H (id TC (pr1 cd, I))

  (id (H (pr1 cd), H I))

        apply (! functor_id _ _).
      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH

E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E

  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE

  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
d: D
cd: ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d
rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
  [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
  (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
  (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
     [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
     [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
     (is_univalent_functor_category
        (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
     (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
     (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
     (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
        (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
        (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
        (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))) (TC ∙ H)
  (pr1 cd, I) =
id TD (H (pr1 cd), H I)
· pr1
    (rad_eps [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
       [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
       (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH)
       (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
          [precategory_binproduct_data D D, D]
          [precategory_binproduct_data C C, D]
          (is_univalent_functor_category
             (precategory_binproduct_data D D) D Duniv)
          (pre_composition_functor (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D
             HH)
          (precomp_fully_faithful.pre_composition_with_ess_surj_and_fully_faithful_is_fully_faithful
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff))
          (precomp_ess_surj.pre_composition_essentially_surjective
             (C ⊠ C) (D ⊠ D) D Duniv HH
             (pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso)
             (pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff)))
       (TC ∙ H)) (pr1 cd, I)

      apply (! id_left _).
    
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
(λ yy : functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE G,
 Isos.z_iso_disp
   (identity_z_iso
      (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
         I TE IE G)) (precompRU G yy) GG)
  ((λ d : D,
    factor_through_squash
      (E (I_posttensor TE IE ((pr11 G) d))
         ((pr11 G) d) (ruE ((pr11 G) d))
         (# TE (id (pr11 G) d #, pr22 G)
          · (pr112 G) (d, H I) · # (pr11 G) (ruD d)))
      (λ cd : ∑ a : C, z_iso (H a) d,
       let p := isotoid D Duniv (pr2 cd) in
       paths_rect D (H (pr1 cd))
         (λ (d0 : D) (_ : H (pr1 cd) = d0),
          ruE ((pr11 G) d0) =
          # TE (id (pr11 G) d0 #, pr22 G)
          · (pr112 G) (d0, H I) · # (pr11 G) (ruD d0))
         (GG (pr1 cd) @
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (E ⟦ pr1 G (ID I), pr1 G (ID I) ⟧)
             (# (pr1 G) (id ID I)) (id pr1 G (ID I))
             (λ p0 : E ⟦ pr1 G (ID I), pr1 G (ID I) ⟧,
              # TE
                (id pr1 G (H (pr1 cd)) #, pr22 G · p0)
              · ((pr12 G) (H (pr1 cd), H I)
                 · # (pr1 G)
                     (rad_eps
                        [precategory_binproduct_data D
                           D, D]
                        [precategory_binproduct_data C
                           C, D]
                        (pre_composition_functor ...
                           ... D HH)
                        (ff_essentially_surjective_to_split
                           ... ... ... ... ... ...)
                        (TC ∙ H) (pr1 cd, I)))
              · # (pr1 G) (# H (ru (pr1 cd))) =
              # TE
                (id (pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd)) #, pr22 G)
              · (pr112 G) (H (pr1 cd), H I)
              · # (pr11 G) (ruD (H (pr1 cd))))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (E ⟦ IE, pr1 G (ID I) ⟧)
                (pr22 G · id pr1 G (ID I)) (pr22 G)
                (λ p0 : E ⟦ IE, pr1 G (ID I) ⟧,
                 # TE (id pr1 G (H ...) #, p0)
                 · ((pr12 G) (H ..., H I)
                    · # (pr1 G)
                        (rad_eps ... ... ... ... ...
                           ...))
                 · # (pr1 G) (# H (ru (...))) =
                 # TE (id (pr11 G) (H ...) #, pr22 G)
                 · (pr112 G) (H (pr1 cd), H I)
                 · # (pr11 G) (ruD (H (...))))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (E ⟦ TE (pr1 G (H (...)), IE),
                    pr1 G (H (pr1 cd)) ⟧)
                   (# TE (id pr1 G (H ...) #, pr22 G)
                    · ((pr12 G) (H ..., H I)
                       · # (pr1 G)
                           (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                              ... ...))
                    · # (pr1 G) (# H (ru (...))))
                   (# TE
                      (id pr1 G (H (...)) #, pr22 G)
                    · ((pr12 G) (H ..., H I)
                       · # (pr1 G)
                           (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                              ... ...)
                       · # (pr1 G) (# H (...))))
                   (λ p0 : E ⟦ TE (pr1 G (...), IE),
                           pr1 G (H (...)) ⟧,
                    p0 =
                    # TE (id ... ... #, pr22 G)
                    · (pr112 G) (H ..., H I)
                    · # (pr11 G) (ruD (...)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (E
                       ⟦ TE (pr1 G (...), pr1 G (...)),
                       pr1 G (H (...)) ⟧)
                      ((pr12 G) (H ..., H I)
                       · # (pr1 G)
                           (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                              ... ...)
                       · # (pr1 G) (# H (...)))
                      ((pr12 G) (H (...), H I)
                       · (# (...) (...)
                          · # (...) (...)))
                      (λ p0 : E ⟦ TE (..., ...),
                              pr1 G (...) ⟧,
                       # TE (id ... #, pr22 G) · p0 =
                       # TE ... · ... ...
                       · # (pr11 G) (...))
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (E ⟦ TE (..., IE),
                          (pr11 G) (...) ⟧)
                         (# TE ... · ... ...
                          · # (pr11 G) (...))
                         (# TE (id ... #, pr22 G)
                          · (... · ...))
                         (λ p0 : E ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                          ... · ... = p0)
                         (maponpaths (compose ...)
                            (maponpaths ... ...))
                         (assoc' (# TE ...) (... ...)
                            (# ... ...)))
                      (assoc' ((pr12 G) (H ..., H I))
                         (# (pr1 G)
                            (rad_eps ... ... ... ...
                               ... ...))
                         (# (pr1 G) (# H ...))))
                   (assoc'
                      (# TE
                         (id pr1 G (H ...) #, pr22 G))
                      ((pr12 G) (H (...), H I)
                       · # (pr1 G)
                           (rad_eps [..., D] [..., D]
                              (...) (...) (...)
                              (..., I)))
                      (# (pr1 G) (# H (ru ...)))))
                (id_right (pr22 G)))
             (functor_id (pr1 G) (ID I))
           :
           # TE
             (id (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor
                          Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE
                          G)) (pr1 cd)
             #, pr22 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                        H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
           · (pr112 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                       H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
               (pr1 cd, I)
           · # (pr11 (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv
                        H_eso H_ff TC I TE IE G))
               (ru (pr1 cd)) =
           # TE (id (pr11 G) (H (pr1 cd)) #, pr22 G)
           · (pr112 G) (H (pr1 cd), H I)
           · # (pr11 G) (ruD (H (pr1 cd))))) d p)
      (H_eso d))
   :
   functor_ru_disp_cat ruD ruE G)
 
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
Isos.is_z_iso_disp
  (identity_z_iso
     (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
        TE IE G)) tt

      
C, D: category
H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
G: functor_tensorunit_cat
  (TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC) TE 
  (H I) IE
GG: functor_ru_disp_cat ru ruE
  (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC
     I TE IE G)
Isos.is_disp_inverse
  (identity_z_iso
     (precomp_tensorunit_functor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC I
        TE IE G)) tt tt

      split ; apply isapropunit.
  Qed.

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH

TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
fully_faithful (total_functor precompRU)

H: C ⟶ D
Duniv: is_univalent D
H_eso: essentially_surjective H
H_ff: fully_faithful H
TC: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
I: C
ru: right_unitor TC I
TD:= TransportedTensor Duniv H_eso H_ff TC: D ⊠ D ⟶ D
HH_eso:= pair_functor_eso H H H_eso H_eso: essentially_surjective HH
HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
ruD:= TransportedRightUnitor: right_unitor TD (H I)
E: category
Euniv: is_univalent E
TE: E ⊠ E ⟶ E
IE: E
ruE: right_unitor TE IE
fully_faithful (total_functor precompRU)

HH_ff:= pair_functor_ff H H H_ff H_ff: fully_faithful HH
